channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Introducing JFrog ML: Revolutionizing AI/ML Workflows with DevOps Best Practices
item.description: JFrog releases JFrog ML, an MLOps solution that combines devops best practices with traditional devsecops processes for building and deploying enterprise-ready AI applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk's SpaceX confirms Starlink lease agreement with FAA
item.description: SpaceX confirmed Wednesday that it is leasing Starlink kits and service to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for free but denied any push to take over Verizon’s contract to build an updated communications system for the agency.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Thousands of WordPress sites targeted with malicious plugin backdoor attacks
item.description: Four separate backdoors deployed on vulnerable websites, allowing for persistent access, remote code execution, and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Private lunar lander is declared dead after landing sideways in a crater near the moon's south pole
item.description: A private lunar lander is no longer working after landing sideways in a crater near the moon's south pole.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple's New M3 Ultra Chip May Not Be As Powerful As Expected
item.description: The M3 Ultra chip may only be 8% faster than the M4 Max in multi-core performance, according to a Geekbench 6 benchmark. This could make it less ideal for CPU-intensive tasks, but its 80-core GPU may still provide an exceptional gaming experience.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How this sex-forward gay cruising site finally launched an Apple-approved iOS app
item.description: As an app designed to facilitate gay hookups, popular site Sniffies has had a limitation since it launched in 2018—it was accessible only via web browser. Until now. On Monday, the map-based cruising site debuted its Apple-approved iOS app.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Democrats ask for investigation into whether Musk is using government position to influence X advertisers
item.description: Democratic senators are asking the Department of Justice (DOJ) to investigate whether tech billionaire Elon Musk, a senior adviser to President Trump, is leveraging his government position to pressure advertisers into spending more on his social media platform, X.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft-OpenAI investigation closed by UK regulators
item.description: The UK’s Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) spent a great deal of time deciding whether it should investigate Microsoft’s investment in OpenAI as a potential merger situation, but in the end, decided to open and close the investigation within 24 hours.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, Fox 5
